positive_prompt: A top-down fixed-palette semantic bedroom layout. Include 1 required bed, 1 required nightstand. Required layout relations: slot_nightstand_1 adjacent_to slot_bed_1. Respect walls, doors, windows, boundaries, and clearance regions. Use a top-down orthographic fixed-palette semantic map style with clean object boundaries.
negative_prompt: photorealistic texture, perspective view, shadows, labels, text, clutter, cropped room
architecture_constraints: Keep all furniture inside the room boundary with 4 vertices.
